title: Invidious
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Invidious'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] |line= |model= |type=[[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=1,600 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement=[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role= |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] *[[Attack on Tinta Lines]] *[[Skirmish near Kessel]] *[[Battle of Xa Fel (11 ABY)|Second Battle of Xa Fel]] *[[Battle of Algara]] *[[Battle of Susevfi]] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Greater Maldrood]] *[[Invids]] |navy= |fleet= |owners=*[[High Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]] *[[Leonia Tavira]] |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|Is that the ''Rainbow''?''"
"''Nope, looks like a Mark II Imperial Star Destroyer.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Keevy Spart]]|''[[I, Jedi]]''}} The '''''Invidious''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]]. At the time of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] death at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], it was part of a task force commanded by [[High Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]], and served as part of his fleet when he became a self-proclaimed warlord. At some point before [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], the ''Invidious'' was captured by ex-[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Leonia Tavira]] and became the headquarters of her [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] group, the [[Invids]] (which drew their name from the ship). In [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] used a powerful [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] to frighten Tavira into believing that a large [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet, including the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' and the [[Sun Crusher]], was arriving in the vicinity, and she fled. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Invidious }} [[Category:Captured starships]] [[Category:Imperial II-class Star Destroyers]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Starships of the Greater Maldrood]] [[Category:Starships of the Invids]]
